# Prisca Dezigns
> Full-service digital agency offering branding, web design, social media management, and AI-powered tools for Caribbean and global businesses. Services include brand strategy, custom websites, social media management, and access to SaaS platforms including Velloq, Moblync, Karjov, Cupyx, and Trogon.

## About
- **Category:** Digital Agency
- **URL:** https://priscadezigns.org/
- **Keywords:** branding, web design, social media management, digital marketing, Trinidad, Caribbean

## Pages
- [Home](https://priscadezigns.org/)

## What We Offer
Full-service digital agency offering branding, web design, social media management, and AI-powered tools for Caribbean and global businesses. Services include brand strategy, custom websites, social media management, and access to SaaS platforms including Velloq, Moblync, Karjov, Cupyx, and Trogon.
